summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Dimensionlock: The Endless game. All backend APIs pass. Main menu, game canvas, HUD, and keyboard input all work correctly.

issues: Controls grid text is small (11px) and low contrast against the dark semi-transparent background - readable but tight

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') - should use lifespan context manager for FastAPI 0.95+
GameCanvas.jsx: HP shows 88/100 on first frame (enemy already dealt damage before first render) - minor game logic nuance, not a bug
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has 3 endpoints: GET /api/, GET /api/health, GET /api/scores/top, POST /api/scores. All pass. Frontend: main menu shows title 'The Endless', play button 'ENTER THE ENDLESS', controls panel, lore text. Clicking play transitions to game canvas with Maytradalis character, shadow demon enemy, platforms, dark starfield background. HUD shows HP/SP bars, FLOOR 1, WAVE 1/3, SCORE. Keyboard input works. No errors found.
